title: Currently on 3.12
excerpt: Digging : the fact that so many of you are saying such wonderful things about the first Amy Tangerine signature bag and placing orders. I am working on getting photos taken of the inside so I will be updating soon.…
body:
Digging: the fact that so many of you are saying such wonderful things about the first Amy Tangerine signature bag and placing orders. I am working on getting photos taken of the inside so I will be updating soon. In case you missed it, I posted a little Vine here.

Drinking: green smoothies and lots of water

Eating: spinach salads but way too much fast food as well. Hey, it's all about balance, right?

Listening: Of Monsters and Men Channel on Pandora

Wearing: Marc by Marc Jacobs zip hoodie, our Come and Get Your Love tee, Lululemon pants

Reading: almost done with Pineapple Grenade by Tim Dorsey

Feeling: a little less tired than I have been

Weather: gorgeous, sunny and feeling like spring

Wanting: to stop playing Candy Crush so much

Needing: more friends on Facebook to send me lives on Candy Crush ;)

Wishing: house hunting was easier and not so darn stressful

Hoping: we find the duplex of our dreams (ha!) soon.

Thinking: my to-do list is longer than usual today and 312 was my first area code (random fact)

Enjoying: Instagrams using the hashtag - #amytangerine -you all are so talented! (Note - if you are private and use this hashtag or tag me - @amytangerine, I often cannot see the photo)

Loving: my friends and their sheer enthusiasm for life.
